description: A calm elegant black-necked stilt Codex pet inspired by Machinarium, with black and white enamel feathers, a needle-thin black mechanical beak, and extremely long slender pink legs.

idle.notes: Quiet standing loop with soft blink, slight head tilt, and feather settling.

walk.notes: Directional walk used for drag-facing movement and left-right travel.

probe.notes: Ground-probing lean with the beak aligned to body direction.

curious.notes: Alert look-around with a slight forward lean.

happy.notes: Small wing-open hop with fast leg taps.

fluff.notes: Feathers puff outward, including the approved motion flecks, then settle.

sleep.notes: One-leg sleep with head tucked and eyes closed.

fly.notes: Light wader flight with unified body and leg direction.

drag.notes: Directional drag uses the same true-facing walk strips as locomotion.

dragFacingValidation.rule: deltaX < 0 => facing left; deltaX > 0 => facing right
manualVerification: left drag uses a true left-facing strip
right drag uses a true right-facing strip
walk-left and walk-right are not swapped
probe beak direction matches body direction
fly body and trailing legs stay directionally unified
